reviews.review_description: Really fun Jousting game!!  I played the demo and have been waiting for this to drop.  Reminds me of Defender of the crown.  This game is a lot of fun,  especially for 10$

developer_response.body: We are very happy that you liked our game and we appreciate your review :)

reviews.review_description: This is a pretty genius idea for a game actually. Gotta say, it’s a blast to play. Went in expecting it to be a gimmick but it’s much more. Can’t wait to see all the progress this makes in the coming months. Bocce Time! still takes up most of my time, but this game is my go to when I’m looking for 20 min sessions.  Give it a try.
